filaments.title: Filament DB
filaments.table.name: Name
form.lowStockThresholdHint: Flag this filament as low stock when remaining weight across non-retired spools drops below this. Leave blank to disable.
compare.title: Compare Filaments
compare.subtitle: Side-by-side comparison of up to 8 filaments.
compare.emptyState: Pick filaments above to compare them.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lowStock.title: Low stock ({count})
dashboard.dryDue.title: Dry cycle due ({count})
dashboard.dryDue.empty: No spools are overdue for drying.
spoolImport.title: Import Spools from CSV
spoolImport.description: Paste or upload a CSV of spool rows. Each row is matched to an existing filament by name (and optionally vendor).
spoolImport.columnsDescription: Required: filament, totalWeight. Optional: vendor, label, lotNumber, purchaseDate (YYYY-MM-DD), openedDate, location.
share.title: Shared Catalogs
share.subtitle: Publish a read-only snapshot of selected filaments that anyone with the link can view or import.
share.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell viewers what's in this catalog…
share.noShares: You haven't published any catalogs yet.
share.unpublishConfirm: Unpublish this shared catalog? The link will stop working.
share.public.notFound: This shared catalog doesn't exist (or has been unpublished).
analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Filament usage across recent prints.
analytics.noData: No usage recorded in this window yet — log some usage on a spool, or have your slicer POST /api/print-history.
nozzles.title: Nozzles
nozzles.notFound: Nozzle not found. It may have been deleted.
nozzles.fetchError: Failed to load nozzle. Please try again.
nozzles.table.name: Name
nozzles.form.name: Name
nozzles.form.installedInHint: Mark which printers have this nozzle installed. Useful when you have multiple physical nozzles of the same type (e.g. a Diamondback 0.4 in each of two printers).
bedTypes.title: Bed Types
bedTypes.notFound: Bed type not found. It may have been deleted.
bedTypes.fetchError: Failed to load bed type. Please try again.
bedTypes.table.name: Name
bedTypes.form.name: Name
bedTypes.form.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes about this bed type...
locations.title: Locations
locations.empty: No locations defined yet. Locations are where your spools physically live (drybox, shelf, printer, etc.) — useful once you have more than a handful of spools.
locations.notFound: Location not found. It may have been deleted.
locations.fetchError: Failed to load location. Please try again.
locations.table.name: Name
locations.form.name: Name
locations.form.humidityHint: Optional. Typically used for dryboxes — update manually after checking the hygrometer.
printers.title: Printers
printers.empty: No printers defined yet. Add a printer to start tracking per-printer calibrations.
printers.notFound: Printer not found. It may have been deleted.
printers.fetchError: Failed to load printer. Please try again.
printers.table.name: Name
printers.form.name: Name
printers.form.nameHint: Auto-generated from manufacturer and model. Edit to customize.
printers.form.nozzlesHint: Select the nozzles installed or available for this printer.
printers.form.nozzlesLoadError: Could not load nozzles. Check that the server is running and try again.
printers.form.amsSlotsHint: If this printer has an AMS, MMU, or similar multi-material system, define one slot per position so you can track which spool is loaded where.
nfc.readDialog.similarFilaments: Similar filaments -- add as color variant?
atlas.import.title: Import from MongoDB Atlas
atlas.import.description: Enter a MongoDB Atlas connection string to browse and import filaments from another database.
atlas.import.confirmMessage: Import {count} filament(s) into your local database?
atlas.import.confirmDetails: Existing filaments with the same name will be updated. New filaments will be created. Parent-variant relationships will not be preserved.
prusament.import.title: Import Prusament Spool
prusament.import.description: Enter a Prusament spool ID or paste the full URL from the QR code on your spool.
openprinttag.title: OpenPrintTag Database
openprinttag.subtitle: {fdmCount} FDM filaments across {brandCount} brands
openprinttag.noResults: No filaments match the current filters.
openprinttag.fetchingDescription:
Downloading and parsing ~11,000 material files from GitHub.
This may take 10–30 seconds on first load (cached for 1 hour after).
error.title: Something went wrong
detail.clone.title: Clone this filament as a new color variant
detail.exportOpt.title: Download OpenPrintTag NFC binary (.bin)
detail.spool.retireTitle: Mark this spool as retired. It will be excluded from inventory totals but its history is preserved.
detail.error.notFound: Filament not found. It may have been deleted.
detail.error.loadFailed: Failed to load filament. Please try again.
detail.error.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the server.
detail.weight.invalidInput: Enter a valid weight in grams
detail.nfc.writeTitle: Write OpenPrintTag data to NFC tag
detail.nfc.updateWeightTitle: Write updated weight to NFC tag
detail.spool.prusamentImportTitle: Import spool from Prusament QR code
detail.preset.label: Label
detail.tds.title: Technical Data Sheet
edit.title: Edit Filament
edit.unsaved.title: Unsaved Changes
edit.unsaved.message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave? Your changes will be lost.
new.title: Add New Filament
new.prusament.inputLabel: Spool ID or URL from QR code
new.tds.urlLabel: Technical Data Sheet URL (PDF or web page)
new.tds.aiDescription: Uses AI to extract filament properties.
new.ini.profileCount: {count} filament profiles found in INI file
new.toast.populatedFromPrusament: Form populated from Prusament spool data
form.fetchError: Could not load {items}. Some dropdowns may be empty. Check that the server is running.
form.name: Name
form.parentInheritHint: This filament will inherit shared settings (temps, density, retraction, etc.) from its parent. Only color, name, and cost need to be set here.
form.netFilamentHint: Filament weight without the spool (from TDS or packaging).
form.emptySpoolHint: Weight of the empty spool reel (without filament).
form.initialWeightHint: Creates your first spool. Add more from the detail page.
form.calibrationsHint: Per-nozzle overrides for calibration values. Leave blank to use base defaults.
form.calibrationsPrinterHint: Select a printer tab for printer-specific calibrations.
form.tooltip.em: Extrusion Multiplier — flow rate scaling factor (e.g. 0.95)
form.tooltip.pa: Pressure Advance — compensates for filament compression (e.g. 0.053)
form.tooltip.zLift: Z Lift — nozzle raises by this amount during retraction
form.presetsDescription: Define named presets with different temperature and extrusion multiplier settings.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your Filament DB instance.
settings.nozzlesDesc: Manage nozzle profiles for your printers.
settings.printersDesc: Manage printer profiles and installed nozzles.
settings.bedTypesDesc: Manage bed surface types for per-bed calibrations.
settings.locationsDesc: Manage inventory locations (drybox, shelf, printer) for your spools.
settings.currencyDesc: Choose how filament costs are displayed.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the display language for the app.
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.theme.desc: Light, dark, or follow your operating system.
settings.connectionModeDesc: Choose how Filament DB connects to MongoDB.
settings.connectionAtlasDesc: Store data in MongoDB Atlas. Accessible from any device.
settings.connectionHybridDesc: Local database with cloud sync. Works offline.
settings.connectionStringPrivacy: Your connection string is stored locally and never shared.
settings.snapshotsDesc: Download a snapshot of your database or restore from a previous backup.
settings.restoreConfirm: This will replace all existing data with the snapshot. Continue?
settings.aiFeaturesDesc: Use AI to extract filament properties from technical data sheets.
settings.nfcToolsDesc: Read and write OpenPrintTag NFC tags.
settings.eraseConfirm: This will erase all data on the tag. Continue?
setup.title: Welcome to Filament DB
setup.subtitle: Choose how you want to store your filament data.
setup.atlasDesc: Store your data in the cloud. Access from any device.
setup.atlasPrompt: Enter your MongoDB Atlas connection string to get started.
setup.hybridDesc: Local database with cloud sync. Works offline, syncs when connected.
setup.hybridPrompt: Enter your MongoDB Atlas connection string for cloud sync.
setup.hybridModeExplanation: Data is stored locally and synced to Atlas when online.
setup.offlineDesc: Embedded local database. No internet required.
setup.offlineExplanation: All data is stored locally in an embedded MongoDB instance.
setup.offlineDesktopOnly: Offline mode is only available in the desktop app.
setup.offlineSwitchLater: You can switch to Atlas or Hybrid mode later in Settings.
setup.desktopOnlyModes: Offline and Hybrid modes require the desktop app.
setup.connectionStringPrivacy: Your connection string is stored locally and never shared.
settings.aiCostNote.gemini: Google Gemini offers a free tier (15 requests/minute). No charges for typical usage.
settings.aiCostNote.paid: API calls to {provider} are billed per use. Check your provider's pricing page for current rates.
